compliance_rules.description: Technology sector stocks must be rated A or above
Stocks rated below AA need at least 2 analyst buy/strong_buy recommendations
Maximum single position size is 10% of portfolio value
Total portfolio cash must not drop below $15,000
Combined Tech exposure across P1 and P2 must not exceed $35,000
If selling more than 50 MSFT shares, must also buy at least 25 shares of an Energy stock rated AA or above
